allow: PowerShell(az account show --query "{nombre:name, subscripcion:id, estado:state}" -o table 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\deploy_tmp\\logs2\\LogFiles" -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 8 | Format-Table FullName, LastWriteTime, Length)
